server/src/image_tool/corpus.py :: CorpusSample
class CorpusSample:
    name: str
    description: str
    raster: Raster

server/src/image_tool/corpus.py :: color_bands
def color_bands(width: int, height: int, bands: int = 6) -> Raster:
    data = bytearray(width * height * 3)
    palette = [
        (220, 40, 40),
        (240, 180, 30),
        (50, 180, 70),
        (40, 120, 220),
        (120, 60, 200),
        (220, 80, 180),
    ]
    band_width = max(1, width // bands)
    for row in range(height):
        for col in range(width):
            band = min(bands - 1, col // band_width)
            red, green, blue = palette[band % len(palette)]
            index = (row * width + col) * 3
            data[index : index + 3] = bytes((red, green, blue))
    return Raster(width, height, 3, data)
